title: VL+
description: VL+ Differentiates many things on the Ventureland Minecraft RPG server to make things easier to spot and ups the quality of running around exploring the world by changing some mobs textures using RET(ETF)
body:
# The VL+ pack
is made to give the best experience on the Ventureland RPG server. Adding many things via CIT that makes it easy to differantiate between items and GUI icons. It also changes particles and fire to make the Psycho Bandit boss fight alot more bareable visually. RET/ETF is also added to make exploring a little more fun now that mobs that would normally look the same look different now!

### Recomended and used version is 1.21.1
will ofc work on other versions but thats wat [Ventureland Utils](https://modrinth.com/project/oA3tu0Cm) is on

Note: there are certain issues using OF fabric alternatives

![Shows the icons made for all the boot mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4638d82f0ad457a6bcb1188d8c45b396db594c22.png)

Note this is an Add-on pack meaning u will need to download the original server pack to truly get the best experience,
this can be done by simply using the command /resource on the server and choosing to use and download the original pack.
also note that u should get a CIT mod for most of the textures to show up aswell as a RET/ETF mod for custom mob textures. U can use the Respackopt mod for more options in the resourcepack menu for the pack
Check versions tab and click a version to see its dependecies
